basic_details.job_title: Mizoram University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram University Recruitment 2026 for 10 posts of Guest Faculty. Candidates with Ph.D Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 24-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Mizoram University official website mzu.edu.in.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Mizoram University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
